evals.name: wfid-init-mode
evals.prompt: Run /context-audit init on this project. The CLAUDE.md is at evals/fixtures/wfid/CLAUDE.md and the skill inventory is at evals/fixtures/wfid/skills-inventory.md. Use these files as the audit inputs — do not read from the live WFID project.
evals.expected_output: Classify at least 3 CLAUDE.md sections as 'move to mfa-professor skill': the story context read directive, key-insights read directive, and 5 of 6 WFID-specific guidelines. Keep: opening paragraph, working-with-nelson.md directive, MOC directive, Document Authority Notes, 'Don't read Chats/' rule. Token savings > 0.

assertions.name: move-to-skill-present
assertions.description: Report classifies at least one section as 'move to skill' (or 'move to professor')
assertions.check: The report must contain a classification of 'move to skill' or 'move to professor' for at least one section

assertions.name: mfa-professor-referenced
assertions.description: Report mentions mfa-professor by name as the target skill
assertions.check: The string 'mfa-professor' or 'professor skill' must appear in the report

assertions.name: story-context-moved
assertions.description: The 'Read WFID Story Context' directive is classified as move-to-skill, not keep
assertions.check: The story context read directive must be classified as 'move to skill' or 'move to professor', not 'keep'

assertions.name: wfid-guidelines-moved
assertions.description: At least 4 of 6 WFID-specific guidelines are classified as move-to-skill
assertions.check: Guidelines like 'don't rewrite prose', 'reference the beat sheet', 'the ghost is central' must be classified as move-to-skill

assertions.name: document-authority-kept
assertions.description: Document Authority Notes section is classified as keep
assertions.check: Document Authority Notes must be classified as 'keep'

assertions.name: dont-read-chats-kept
assertions.description: The 'Don't read Chats/' rule is kept (applies to all agents)
assertions.check: The Chats/ avoidance rule must be classified as 'keep', not moved to a skill

assertions.name: token-savings-positive
assertions.description: After column shows fewer tokens than before column
assertions.check: The token estimate must show savings > 0

assertions.name: skill-inventory-performed
assertions.description: The audit lists or references the project's skills before classifying
assertions.check: The agent must read or reference the skills inventory before presenting classifications

evals.name: wfid-skill-mode
evals.prompt: Run /context-audit skill on this project. The mfa-professor SKILL.md is at evals/fixtures/wfid/mfa-professor-SKILL.md. Use this file as the audit input — do not read from the live WFID project.
evals.expected_output: Deep-audit mfa-professor (2925 tokens, verbose). Flag: commentary restating frontmatter (line 8), redundant trigger phrases (lines 10-12). Apply persona/creative exception to: Project Binder, Session Notes, Professor Character, The Office, Stage Directions. Flag 'The Novel' section as potential redundancy with startup-loaded context. Do NOT flag persona traits, office description, or teaching philosophy as noise.

assertions.name: frontmatter-commentary-flagged
assertions.description: Line 8 restating frontmatter is flagged as commentary
assertions.check: The opening line 'An MFA creative writing professor...' must be flagged as commentary or redundancy

assertions.name: persona-exception-applied
assertions.description: Persona/creative exception is mentioned and applied
assertions.check: The report must mention the persona or creative exception

assertions.name: office-not-flagged
assertions.description: The Office section is NOT flagged as noise
assertions.check: The Office section must not be classified as any noise category (commentary, file discovery, inline bloat, redundancy, dead weight)

assertions.name: teaching-philosophy-not-flagged
assertions.description: Teaching Philosophy is NOT flagged as noise
assertions.check: Teaching Philosophy must not be classified as noise

assertions.name: novel-section-flagged
assertions.description: The Novel section is flagged as potential redundancy
assertions.check: 'The Novel' section should be flagged as redundancy or potential redundancy with startup-loaded context
